data.name: Auth_InvalidCredentials
data.value: The provided credentials are invalid.

data.name: Auth_PasswordMismatch
data.value: Passwords do not match.

data.name: Auth_TokenGenerationFailed
data.value: Failed to generate the authentication token.

data.name: Auth_Email_Required
data.value: Email is required.

data.name: Auth_Email_InvalidFormat
data.value: Email format is not valid.

data.name: Auth_Password_Required
data.value: Password is required.

data.name: Auth_Password_MinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

data.name: Auth_ConfirmPassword_MustMatch
data.value: Confirmation password must match the password.

data.name: Fisherman_FirstName_Required
data.value: First name is required.

data.name: Fisherman_FirstName_NotWhitespace
data.value: First name cannot be empty or whitespace only.

data.name: Fisherman_FirstName_MaxLength
data.value: First name cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Fisherman_LastName_Required
data.value: Last name is required.

data.name: Fisherman_LastName_NotWhitespace
data.value: Last name cannot be empty or whitespace only.

data.name: Fisherman_LastName_MaxLength
data.value: Last name cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Fisherman_BirthDate_InPast
data.value: Date of birth must be in the past.

data.name: Fisherman_MinimumAge
data.value: The fisherman must be at least {0} years old.

data.name: Fisherman_DocumentType_Invalid
data.value: Document type is not valid.

data.name: Fisherman_DocumentNumber_Required
data.value: Document number is required.

data.name: Fisherman_DocumentNumber_NotWhitespace
data.value: Document number cannot be empty or whitespace only.

data.name: Fisherman_DocumentNumber_MinLength
data.value: Document number must be at least {0} characters long.

data.name: Fisherman_DocumentNumber_MaxLength
data.value: Document number cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Fisherman_DocumentNumber_InvalidFormat
data.value: Document number can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and spaces.

data.name: Fisherman_DocumentNumber_InvalidControlLetter
data.value: Document number is invalid: the check letter does not match.

data.name: Fisherman_FederationLicense_MaxLength
data.value: Federation license cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: Fisherman_NotFound
data.value: The requested fisherman does not exist.

data.name: Fisherman_DuplicateLicense
data.value: A fisherman with this federation license already exists.

data.name: Fisherman_InvalidDocument
data.value: The document number is not valid for the selected document type.

data.name: Database_DuplicateEntry
data.value: A record with these unique values already exists.

data.name: Database_SaveFailure
data.value: Failed to save the record. Please try again.

data.name: User_NotFound
data.value: User not found.

data.name: User_BlockFailed
data.value: Failed to block the user.

data.name: User_UnblockFailed
data.value: Failed to unblock the user.

data.name: User_RoleAssignFailed
data.value: Failed to assign the role to the user.

data.name: User_InvalidRole
data.value: The specified role is not valid.

data.name: User_GetAllFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve users. Please try again.

data.name: User_CreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create the user. Please try again.
